title: rubus obtusidentatus
intro: Rubus obtusidentatus, also known as the obtuse-toothed bramble or Chinese thorny raspberry, is a species of bramble in the rose family that is native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus obtusidentatus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against certain types of cancer. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal use, which can be obtained from the roots, leaves, and fruits of the plant.
